title: websocket_capability().ok() silently discards parse errors in egui
description: client_task.rs line 149: session.websocket_capability().ok().flatten() converts Err(ClientError::Parse(...)) to None, making a malformed WS capability object indistinguishable from an absent one. Code falls to the (None, _) branch and logs 'server has no WebSocket capability' with no warning. Server misconfiguration or protocol version mismatch becomes invisible, and ephemeral events are permanently disabled for the session with no actionable error to the user.
